subject: TOOL-AFFORDANCES implementation validation

blocking_conditions.evidence: Zero matches for 'analyze' or 'analyse' in typed-result.ts
serializeNext, toolCategory, suggestedToolsAfterSuccess, suggestedToolsFor, affordancesAfterSuccess, affordancesFor — all annotated @internal

integration_checks.description: Roadmap outputs both items (new) and next (deprecated) fields

integration_checks.evidence: Uses Set<string> for dedup; 6 test cases all pass
formatOutput includes '"next":' in structured marker; parseOutput recovers it; tests pass

integration_checks.description: makeSuccess, makeFailure, makeDenied, makeCancelled, fromDefect all set next via serializeNext
integration_checks.evidence: Source verified for all 5. Tests cover 4/5 — fromDefect tested only indirectly via unverified production path. See defect D1.

typecheck.details: No errors originating from src/tool/typed-result.ts. 40+ pre-existing type errors in campaign/*, test/plugin/*, test/server/*, test/tool/registry.test.ts — all unrelated.

tests.note: smart_bun tool truncated stderr output; only 9/22 passes visible in raw output. Exit code 0 confirms all 22 pass.

defects.detail: fromDefect is not imported in the test file. All other constructors (makeSuccess, makeFailure, makeDenied, makeCancelled) have explicit next-field tests. Source at typed-result.ts:246-264 shows fromDefect computes next, but no test verifies it.

defects.description: analytics.ts tool_invocations metric staged alongside but not in implementation claim
defects.detail: 39-line diff adding tool_invocations metric to AnalyticsTool. Staged in same commit but was not declared in the 3-file implementation scope. Could be unintended bundled change or parallel-lane leak.

defects.description: typed-result.ts has unstaged changes on top of staged changes
defects.detail: git status shows staged (M) AND unstaged (M) for typed-result.ts. Additional working-tree edits exist beyond the staged 339-line diff. Could indicate WIP edits not yet staged or dirty state from parallel lane.

rationale: All 4 blocking conditions (B2-B4, EXPORTS) pass. All 4 integration checks pass. Typecheck clean for the changed file. All 22 test cases pass. Three minor non-blocking defects: fromDefect test gap (D1), potentially unintended analytics.ts staging (D2), and unstaged changes on typed-result.ts (D3). Recommendation: inspect D2 and D3 before git push; D1 can be deferred.
